name: Deep-Dish Burritos
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Low-fat Jack or Cheddar cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap 2 tortillas in paper towels and microwave on HIGH (100% power) for 30 seconds to soften.
2. Place the heated tortillas in a 2-quart rectangular microwave-proof dish.
3. Spoon 1/4 cup of heated Mexican refried beans onto the center of each tortilla.
4. Top each with 1 tablespoon of shredded cheese, 1 tablespoon of chopped tomato, and 1 cup of shredded lettuce.
5. Spoon 1 tablespoon of salsa cruda on top.
6. Fold the bottom third of one tortilla up over the filling.
7. Fold the right and left sides toward the center, overlapping slightly.
8. Fold the top third down to form a rectangular package.
9. Place the burrito, seam-side down, in the dish.
10. Repeat steps 1-9 with the second tortilla.
11. Heat remaining tortillas as above (2 at a time) and repeat the filling procedure for each.
12. Cover the burritos in the dish with wax paper and microwave on MEDIUM (50% power) for 3 to 6 minutes.
13. Makes 4 servings.
